name: brian-code
description: AI coding assistant with web UI

scripts.dev: yarn workspace @brian-code/web dev & yarn workspace @brian-code/server dev
scripts.build: yarn workspace @brian-code/web build && yarn workspace @brian-code/server build && rm -rf packages/server/public/assets && cp -r packages/web/dist/* packages/server/public/
scripts.build:prod: yarn workspace @brian-code/web build && yarn workspace @brian-code/server build && node scripts/bundle.js
scripts.lint: yarn workspace @brian-code/server lint & yarn workspace @brian-code/web lint
